rationale: Ground truth offers almost no substantive concerns (just an LGTM/approve and an unrelated ask to file a separate VoxCPM2 PR), which neither candidate addresses, so recall is low and tied. Both candidates independently traced the seed→tts_local_seed→gpu_model_runner mechanism accurately and reached an approve-level verdict with a similar guard-comment nit, showing strong grounding and actionability. Y edges ahead by additionally distinguishing that stage 1's seed removal was inert (greedy temperature, propagation only reads stage 0) versus stage 0's being the real fix, yielding a more precise, two-part actionable comment.
